title: asplenium ruta-muraria var. schriesheimense
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria var. schriesheimense, also known as the wall rue, is a rare, fern-like plant species that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of wall rue include its potential to treat various health conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Wall rue can be prepared through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
